headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Stock Near $984 After Big Rally Is There Still Upside Potential
summary: If you are wondering whether Caterpillar at US$984.24 still offers value after such a strong run, this article breaks down what the current price might be implying. The stock has recorded returns of 4.1% over the past week, 11.9% over the past month, 64.5% year to date, and 166.7% over the last year, which can change how investors think about both upside potential and risk. Recent coverage has focused on Caterpillar as a key player in capital goods and heavy machinery, with attention on how...

summary: Alphabet's inclusion in the Dow gives the 130-year-old blue-chip index a dose of the same mega-cap tech trade already dominating the Nasdaq 100 (^NDX).

headline: US stocks rise as falling oil prices help take pressure off the market
summary: Stocks rose on Wall Street Wednesday as falling bond yields and lower oil prices helped ease pressure on the market.  Technology stocks were gaining ground after two days of losses that weighed on the market.  Apple rose 1%, Amazon jumped 3% and Caterpillar rose 1.6%.
